title: Account
subtitle: Login or register
accountDescription: Register to track your stats and appear on the leaderboard, or play as a guest.
guestNote: You can also play without an account
guestDescription: Create a temporary name to use for online play without email or password.
guestRules: Guest names must be 2-20 characters and can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
